hypothesis: Introducing explicit uncertainty quantification of thermodynamic and kinetic parameters (e.g., Ea, k0, and CALPHAD-derived phase fractions) in the physics-based simulator and using these uncertainties to inform LLM-guided synthesis planning will yield more robust, parameter-insensitive synthesis routes, with a higher success rate under ±20% perturbations to Ea and k0 compared with plans generated without uncertainty awareness.
